settings.heading: Hair Concerns
settings.subheading: Tackle top hair concerns with the essentials.

settings.heading: Shipping and Returns
settings.content:
Shipping

- FREE Ground Shipping on all orders over $59

- $5.99 Continental standard ground (orders less than $59)

- $15 for expedited shipping up to 10lbs

- Orders processing time: 2-4 business days

- Orders placed on weekends and holidays will be processed the next business day.

- See Shipping page for more details: Shipping

Returns

- FREE returns and exchanges in store for qualifying online purchases

- See Returns page for more details: Returns

SELECT TOOLS AND DEVICES ARE FINAL SALES (it will state that information on each product description):

All others: We are happy to refund or exchange them if returned within 14 days
of purchase, if it is returned in its original state, unused and in
original packaging with the seal unbroken and package not damaged.
Please contact us directly for more details.

settings.custom-message: no coupons can be applied to this item
Final sale: Refunds are only available for sealed, unopened items returned within 30 days. Manufacturer registration and warranty may apply.
Maximum order allowed of 6 per customer per month

settings.message: We recently switched our online systems. If you had an account previously, please re-register with a new account HERE.

settings.heading: When my order will ship?
settings.content: Our shipping warehouse is open M-F 9am - 5pm, orders placed within this time frame on average go out in 1-2 business days, however we reserve up to 4 business days to ship orders. In a case where an order is delayed beyond 4 days, the customer will be notified.

settings.heading: Can I use Groupon for web orders?
settings.content: Unfortunately, we are only accepting Groupons for instore purchases at this time.

settings.heading: Do you ship outside the US?
settings.content: We do offer international shipping for an additional fee. Please see information more here: Shipping Policy

settings.heading: Where do input my coupon code?
settings.content: Once items are added to your cart, you can click the "view and edit cart" button from the "My Cart" drop down menu. From there you will see on the right hand side of the page in the summary box you will click "Apply Discount Code" and add in your coupon. Please note our coupon codes are Case Sensitive.

settings.heading: Why didn't my coupon code work?
settings.content: All our coupon codes are case sensitive as well as subject to some exclusions which you may see the full list here: Coupon Exclusions. If you are still unsure or having trouble please give us a call or email, we will be happy to assist you.

settings.heading: Do we offer Curbside pick up at the stores?
settings.content: Yes we do. Just place your order for pick up instore and once it is ready for pick up give us a call to let us know you are outside and we will bring it right to you.

settings.heading: How many days I have to return an item?
settings.content: You have 30 days to return your items from when they were received. If it was an online order, shipping charges may apply. Please see our full return policy here: Returns

settings.heading: Can I change an item on my open order?
settings.content: Unfortunately, we cannot modify or subsitute items in your order at this time.

settings.heading: Can I cancel my order?
settings.content: Yes, as long as your order hasn't already shipped we can still cancel your order.

settings.heading: How soon will I see my refund?
settings.content: On average you can see your refund in your account in about 3-4 business days.

settings.heading: Can I change an order for store pick up to be ship to me? It is good to explain about the minimum order amount shipping fee.
settings.content: Yes you may switch any store pick up order to be shipped to you as long as your order is over $39. Please give us a call or email, we would be happy to help!

settings.heading: Can I change  an order from shipping to store pick up?
settings.content: Yes you may switch your shipping order to a store pick up, as long as it hasn't already shipped and the location of your choice has the items available. Feel free to give us a call or email, we would be happy to help!

settings.heading: How do I track my order? Link doesn’t work.
settings.content: If your tracking link isnt working. You can always copy and paste your tracking number directly into the google search engine for the most up to date tracking information.

settings.heading: Do I need to make an account to place an order?
settings.content: Not at all. Though we always recommend signing up for an account so you can look back and find all your order information in one place.

settings.heading: My product arrived damaged, what do I do?
settings.content: For all items that are received damaged, we request that you take a photo and send it to our customer support team at info@planetbeauty.com so that we may notify our warehouse of the error and further assist you in a replacement. We are not responsible for issuing replacements or refunds on items without proper documentation. Please, if you receive a damaged product, please take an image and send to our customer support team and wait for further instructions, please do not dispose of the item prior to receiving a response.
